# selectedString()

**Instance Method**

Returns the currently selected text in the web document as a string.

## Declaration

```swift
func selectedString() -> String!
```

## Return Value

The currently selected text in the web document.

## Selecting and deselecting text

- **selectAll()**: Selects all the text in the web document.
- **deselectAll()**: Deselects the currently selected text in the web document.
- **selectedAttributedString()**: Returns the currently selected text in the web document as an attributed string.
